All done with me?
It's good.

Yeah.

So I like the, like, it's like real wood, you know?
Yeah, yeah.
I can enjoy putting the stuff together.

I had to redo it.

Yeah, put like the tracks, like everything was like on the wrong side.
I don't know.
I need more detailed instruction.

Yeah.
Not my strength.

Well, it's not a food court, but you know how Ikeas have this restaurant section, whatever.
And the food is amazing at the Ikea, I must say.

I'm usually like, I need to leave.
Get me out of here.

Yeah, we can go ahead and get started.
Cool.

Let me share my screen.
All right.

There's not many talking points as such.
Five hundred and seven.
It goes to be published by the Saturday, and this will include, of course, the editorial articles that Tiago had pointed out around the AI agent architect persona.
we're kind of balancing our usual article production with those new ones.
So that's going pretty smoothly.
In terms of performance for the last week, we took rows compared to week on week.

The rose pretty massively, mainly because of AI overviews showing up in Google.

generally speaking, agents for law, manufacturing, and e-commerce are the most prolific.
So if we're going to dive in next quarter, into any particular pillar, will probably be post three.

So that's the performance roundup.
Any questions I can answer about any of that?
No.
All right.
Regarding the link building, so we actually received a report from our external partners.

So generally pretty reputable sites like the CSAS talk over here.
There's a few tools.

And we are linking to words like AI agent or AI agent architecture or AI agent builder, these sort of terms.
So I just have a few blogs over here in case you want to explore what the websites are like, the kinds of websites we're targeting.
And the number of referring domains generally continues to rise.
Of course, our articles are also sort of attracting backlinks naturally.
So generally, backlinks...

Regarding thought leadership, I know Mara, Jason, and Tiago had a call yesterday.
So, you know, the outcomes of that are still kind of the same.
think we discussed...
Yeah, while we're here, because I want to add you guys.
So who should I add to the LinkedIn from GrowthX, like our company page?
I think adding Jason and Mara would be a good sort of start.
And then we do have a writer working on...
Yeah, Rafi.
I don't know.
Rafi, you're supposed to say that?
Yeah, Rafi.
I don't know if he's onboarded yet fully.
Okay.
So I will check and get back to you.
So just add to all Jason and Mara then right now.
Jason and Mara would be good, yeah.
Okay.
So we're going to schedule the follow-up call to refine the company account persona.

For the JTBD with George, we're still waiting for the list of customers.

So once that gets approved, but I do have a list that is for send, but I think they're making a few edits.
Okay, no worries.
I will let George know about that.
So generally, that's kind of where we're at.
know, TLDR, things are going pretty smoothly.
We're kind of looking forward to build out the JTBD because that will sort of inform future content as well.

No, I simply so.
All right.
Well, that was kind of it.
Thank
For the update for this week, obviously, I'll keep in touch on Slack.
I am off tomorrow and on Monday, but, you know, Mika's here, Mara's here.
So, yeah, yeah.
But, yeah, there's no drop-off in coverage, cetera.
Mara will be back tomorrow.
Okay.
And then I've added Jason and Mara, so if they can just ping me on Slack if they want to add the content writer once he's fully, like, onboarded and stuff.
Yeah, sounds good.
So, yeah, that's pretty much it.
Thanks, Caitlin.
All right.
Thanks.
Have a great one.
Bye.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and ongoing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 507 articles to be published by Saturday, including new AI agent architect persona editorials](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Strong performance: Near all-time high impressions, massive rise in AI overviews on Google, high LLM referrals (88 sessions, mainly ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Link building progress: 22 links built across reputable sites last month, targeting AI agent-related anchor text](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [JTBD research pending: Awaiting approved customer list from Datagrid for George to proceed](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Performance

  - [507 articles scheduled for Saturday publication](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [Balancing regular content with new AI agent architect persona editorials](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Near all-time high impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Massive rise in AI overviews appearing on Google](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [High LLM referrals: 88 sessions, mainly from ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Top-performing topics: construction, task automation in sales](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Emerging categories: AI agents for insurance and healthcare showing growth](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Most prolific categories: agents for law, manufacturing, and e-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)

### Link Building Progress

  - [22 links built across reputable sites in the past month](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Target sites include CSAS talk, tools, and e-commerce platforms](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Anchor text focusing on "AI agent," "AI agent architecture," "AI agent builder"](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Homepage as primary link destination](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Naturally attracting backlinks through article content](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Overall increase in referring domains](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

### Thought Leadership and LinkedIn Strategy

  - [Recent call between Mara, Jason, and Tiago (outcomes pending)](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Action item: Kaitlin to add Jason and Mara to Datagrid's LinkedIn company page](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Potential addition of new content writer (Rafi) once fully onboarded](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Follow-up call scheduled to refine company account persona](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

### Jobs-to-be-Done (JTBD) Research

  - [Awaiting approved customer list from Datagrid](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Kaitlin has initial list, pending final edits and approval](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [George to be informed about the status](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Publish 507 articles by Saturday, including AI agent architect editorials](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of new AI agent categories](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Kaitlin to add Jason and Mara to Datagrid's LinkedIn company page](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call to refine company account persona for LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Await final approval on customer list for JTBD research with George](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Jason/Mara to notify Kaitlin via Slack when content writer is ready to be added to LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Maintain communication via Slack during Vivek's absence (tomorrow and Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/AW7UyaG_pwt69zRypeMy88K8MW1BBxET?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)

action_items.description: Add Jason and Mara from GrowthX to Toric's LinkedIn company page
Inform George about status of customer list for JTBD (pending approval)
